programme.title: Hercules: The Legendary Journeys
programme.desc: Wicked Menas Maxius (Ian Mune) pits slaves against wild animals for his amusement.

programme.title: Hercules: The Legendary Journeys
programme.desc: In a battle for the souls of the fallen soldiers, Hercules takes on Ares and his flesh-eating dog; it's a fierce battle between the gods.

programme.title: Hercules: The Legendary Journeys
programme.desc: After Darphus mutinies, warrior princess Xena joins Hercules to take back her troops.

programme.title: Hercules: The Legendary Journeys
programme.desc: Xena's former lieutenant, Darphus, rises from the dead to carry out Ares' evil plan.

programme.title: Hercules: The Legendary Journeys
programme.desc: Hercules has to assist King Midas with his attempts to reclaim his realm from a group of vicious gamblers.

programme.title: Hercules: The Legendary Journeys
programme.desc: Hercules and Iolaus hide in an old fortress when they incur the wrath of a horde of barbarians upon capturing the group's leader.

programme.title: Hercules: The Legendary Journeys
programme.desc: Hercules defends a young woman and her centaur husband against prejudice.

programme.title: Hercules: The Legendary Journeys
programme.desc: Hercules battles a town run by bandits in order to help a farmer reunite with his estranged wife.

programme.title: Hercules: The Legendary Journeys
programme.desc: Hercules' mother is a pawn in a deadly plot for revenge by Echidna, whose monster children Hercules has slain.

programme.title: Hercules: The Legendary Journeys
programme.desc: After Salmoneus sells off Hera's treasure, Hercules must save him from the fiery monster Pyro.

programme.title: Hercules: The Legendary Journeys
programme.desc: Maceus wants to avenge his brother's death by trying to lure Hercules into battle with the monster Echidna.

programme.title: Hercules: The Legendary Journeys
programme.desc: Hercules must capture King Sisyphus and bring him back to the Underworld to gain justice for the spirit of Timuron, who was hoodwinked into changing places with the King.

programme.title: Hercules: The Legendary Journeys
programme.desc: To save a friend from execution, Hercules must retrieve a sword that renders people incapable of lying.

programme.title: Hercules: The Legendary Journeys
programme.desc: Hercules and Iolaus help Jason and the Argonauts recover the Golden Fleece.

programme.title: Hercules: The Legendary Journeys
programme.desc: Hercules (Kevin Sorbo) falls in love while helping a woman (Audie England) and her band of rebels defeat a tyrannical king (Michael Keir-Morrissey). With Michael Hurst.

programme.title: Hercules: The Legendary Journeys
programme.desc: Hercules promotes peace by organizing an athletic competition between the warring Spartans and Eleans, thus creating the Olympic Games.

programme.title: Hercules: The Legendary Journeys
programme.desc: Iolaus is used as a pawn by the scheming love goddess Aphrodite to prevent a marriage between the children of two feuding kings.

programme.title: Hercules: The Legendary Journeys
programme.desc: Hercules and Iolaus get caught in the middle of a love triangle when they volunteer to help a king.

programme.title: Hercules: The Legendary Journeys
programme.desc: Royal look-alike Iolaus stands in for Orestes at his coronation and wedding to prevent usurper Minos from taking the throne.

programme.title: Hercules: The Legendary Journeys
programme.desc: A friend of Hercules and Iolaus is accused of theft when an angry god distorts reality by making people appear to have performed acts they didn't.

programme.title: Hercules: The Legendary Journeys
programme.desc: The wedding of Hercules' mother to the legendary Greek hero Jason is threatened by another of Hera's plots to kill Hercules.

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: Steve probes a ring peddling nuclear missiles on the black market; guests Britt Ekland, David McCallum.

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: Steve snatches a U.S. ambassador from a kidnap ring, but a statesman is then taken; guest Leif Erickson.

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: After a town's population dies, a former government scientist demands $10 million, or he will destroy another community.

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: Plane-crash survivors Steve and Oscar still face a threat from a group attempting to sabotage international negotiations.

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: Steve and a clairvoyant girl search for a missing scientist in the Everglades; guest Pamela Franklin.

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: Assigned to keep a secret missile-guidance system out of foreign hands, Steve must confront a robot constructed to kill.

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: Steve must repair a damaged plane to escape from an African country with proof of U.N.-treaty violations; guest Greg Morris.

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: Steve rushes to an island space-installation to rescue his friends from a self-destruct weapon triggered by an earthquake.

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: After the attempted murder of a government prosecutor, witness Steve discovers the sniper he saw has an airtight alibi.

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: International criminals kidnap Steve's creator, Dr. Wells, to force him to make another bionic man.

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: Unless Steve can locate its source, a deadly laser beam will destroy a group of prime ministers at a Paris conference.
programme.sub-title: The Last of the Fourth of Julys

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: Steve searches the Himalayas for a downed World War II plane, knowing the discovery of it could brand his father a coward.

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: An underworld syndicate plans to use Steve as the prototype for a team of bionic robots to be used in robbing Fort Knox.

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: Steve stows away aboard a plane carrying an illegal atomic bomb to a small nation; guests Carol Lawrence, George Gaynes.

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: Steve must use all his powers to subdue the male of a cryogenically frozen couple.

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: Assassins attempt to stop Steve from delivering an ailing prime minister scheduled for the first bionic-heart implant.

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: Steve winds up trapped in a mine when he tries to prove Oscar is innocent of gold-smuggling; guest Farley Granger.

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: Steve is determined to fly a new version of the experimental plane that caused his near-fatal crash; guest Clifton James.

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk
programme.desc: A New Orleans doctor (Louise Sorel) enlists Banner's aid to battle her patients' faith in voodoo.

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk
programme.desc: McGee's new publisher orders him off the Hulk story; guest Caroline Smith.

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk
programme.desc: Banner is tarred with the same brush as a motorcyclist who gives him a lift.

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk
programme.desc: A mob wants Banner, mistaken for a serial killer of girls; guest Gerald McRaney.

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk
programme.desc: McGee trails Banner to an private island, where Banner must attend a masquerade.

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk
programme.desc: Hit men kidnap a child to force Banner to cooperate in their killing of a hospitalized mob witness.

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk
programme.desc: Firefighters suspect Banner of starting a forest blaze; guest Kathleen Lloyd.

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk
programme.desc: Trapped halfway through his transformation by meteor radiation, Banner and a blinded girl are taken to a research facility.

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk
programme.desc: The Hulk must escape from the research facility's underground labyrinth; guest Monte Markham.

programme.title: Incredible Hulk
programme.desc: Power-plant worker Banner receives an electrical jolt which enables him to see the future.

programme.title: Incredible Hulk
programme.desc: Seeking a magazine's $1 million reward, a mercenary lures Banner to an isolated laboratory.
programme.sub-title: Bring Me the Head of the Hulk

programme.title: Incredible Hulk
programme.desc: Banner contracts for a cross-country trip in a car loaded with mob loot.

programme.title: Incredible Hulk
programme.desc: A muscleman (Lou Ferrigno) dreams of winning enough money to open a beach café.

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk
programme.desc: Banner helps a young woman whose father left her a wax museum, now run by her unscrupulous uncle.

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk
programme.desc: Seeking gold hidden in Banner's apartment, a gang awards him a Chinese mail-order bride; guest William Windom.

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk
programme.desc: Banner investigates legends of another scientist, dead 30 years, who underwent a Hulk-type metamorphosis.

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk
programme.desc: David must decide between ending his own torment with the rediscovered antidote or ridding the world of the Hulk's dangerous predecessor.

programme.title: Incredible Hulk
programme.desc: David 'Blackwell' is paralyzed; He becomes convinced the Hulk's powers could make him walk again.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Diamond in the Rough
programme.desc: Sydney, Nigel and rival relic hunter Kurt Reiner attempt to find the lost baseball glove of Jimmy Jonesboro.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Nine Lives
programme.desc: Everyone who steals a statue that represents the Egyptian cat-goddess Mafdet is killed. Now, the statue has disappeared and Sidney and Nigel are tasked with retrieving it.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Book of Love
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel are in Milan, Italy to search for Casanova's lost Book of Love.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Myth of the Maze
programme.desc: Sydney, Nigel and Claudia visit Athens, Greece to search the Minotaur's maze for the legendary golden twine.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Afterlife and Death
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel are in Cairo, Egypt and then Amsterdam. They must beat rival relic hunter Avery Ko to the Pharaoh Thutmose's diamond before it is cut up and sold.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Etched in Stone
programme.desc: Sydney, Nigel and Stewie Harper head to Stockholm, Sweden to find the Runestone of King Jann I of Norway.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Irish Crown Affair
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel head to Dublin, Ireland in search of the missing crown of the last King of Ireland.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: A Vanishing Art
programme.desc: Accompanying Max the magician, Sydney and Nigel journey to Atlantic City, New Jersey in search of Hungary's lost and allegedly cursed Royal Scepter.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Love Letter
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel go to France to look for the lost wedding vows of Josephine Pontoise and Guy de Bourdin, which would prove their heir is the rightful owner of St. Agnes Sur-Loire.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: A Good Year
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel travel to France to find the lost stones from Marie Antoinette's Crown.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Nothing But the Truth
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel are reunited with Stewie Harper in the search for the Chalice of Truth in France.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Last Knight
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel go to Paris, France after the Sword of Jacques de Molay, Grand Master of the Knights Templar. Rival relic hunter Rita Rosellini is also after the sword.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Possessed
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel are in Brussels, Belgium in search of the sacred sundial of Zeus in order to stop the Vampires.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Memories of Montmartre
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel head to Paris, France to find a stolen locket, so they can clear Sydney's dead grandmother of the charges.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Put Back
programme.desc: Kuba, Africa 100 AD: Worshippers of Woote curse his idol to protect it. 2000: Ross Crawford comes to Sydney, because he took the idol and the curse has accelerated his aging.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Legend of the Lost
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel set out to find if the legend of the lost civilization in New Guinea is actually true. Unfortunately, they have to team up with Derek Lloyd.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Dagger of Death
programme.desc: India, 500 A.D.: A precious dagger is used in human sacrifices to goddess Kali. Sydney must return a relic to India for her fellow hunter, who believes the dagger made him kill his assistant.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Last of the Mochicas
programme.desc: On a search for a South American Mochica Indian relic of protection, Nigel and his colleagues get captured by local guerrillas. It's up to Sydney and ally Jason Clark to save them.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Fertile Ground
programme.desc: Sydney reunites with her high school sweetheart to track down a Hawaiian fertility idol in Madagascar.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Hickleton Hall
programme.desc: Once a grand mansion, this huge property is now very much passed it previous grandeur. Stuart investigates the long empty corridors alone and something seems to be following him.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Hack Green Nuclear Bunker
programme.desc: Karl and Stuart head to Hack Green Bunker and witness, first hand, the paranormal activity that regularly occurs there.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Charlton House
programme.desc: Karl investigates Carlton house library for the first time and quickly realises that he is not alone.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Bishton Hall
programme.desc: Yvette takes Glen and Mary into the incredibly haunted Bishton Hall. They start in the upper floors and work their way down to the cellars, but is something following them.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Margam Castle P1
programme.desc: Karl investigates the ground floor back rooms of this landmark castle alone, but soon realises that something is lurking in the shadows.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Margam Castle P2
programme.desc: The upper floors of Margam Castle are said to be haunted by many different spirits, Stuart goes it alone to try and find them.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Dorchester Prison 2 P1
programme.desc: Said to be the Most Haunted prison in the UK, HMP Dorchester is a scary place to be with a group of people but alone it becomes terrifying. Karl investigates the upper cells and gets more than he bargained for.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Dorchester Prison 2 P2
programme.desc: Stuart enters the underbelly of this remarkable building and starts to witness some very strange occurrences.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Armely Mills Cottage
programme.desc: The cottage on the site of Armley Mills is said to be full of paranormal activity so Karl decides to enter, alone and witnesses something that is eager to grab his attention.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Shrewsbury Prison
programme.desc: Abandoned prisons are always a daunting prospect and the Most Haunted team love them. This time Karl takes on HMP Shrewsbury alone and experiences some of the unhappy phantoms that lurk in the shadows.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Samlesbury Hall P1
programme.desc: With a history dating back to 1185, Salmesbury Hall is of the UK’s most historic buildings and said to be one of the most haunted. With ghost stories and sightings all over the building, Stuart investigates the ground floor.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Samlesbury Hall P2
programme.desc: Karl investigates the upper floors of this historic building dating back to 1185, and realises he is not alone.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Gressenhall Workhouse Pt1
programme.desc: Karl investigates the very haunted school room in the large imposing Gressenhall Workhouse. The activity starts even before Karl gets into the building and becomes one of the most impressive investigations to date.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Gressenhall Workhouse Pt2
programme.desc: Stuart investigates two buildings, a forge and the cottage. He could not have imagined the activity that unfolded around him.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Bishton Hall P1
programme.desc: Stuart investigates the main house and seems to be pulled in different directions from an unexplained energy.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Bishton Hall P2
programme.desc: Karl ventures down into the cellars of this large country house and soon comes under attack from an unseen force.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen
programme.desc: Karl enters a Masonic Temple alone, seeking the truth behind its eerie reputation. The mysterious world of Freemasonry soon reveals a chilling presence in the shadows.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen
programme.desc: Cameras are left locked-off in haunted sites across the country, capturing chilling activity in a bold experiment with some truly remarkable results.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen
programme.desc: Karl enters the formidable HMP Gloucester and sets up an experiment with some amazing results.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen
programme.desc: Karl and Stuart explore Birmingham's Coffin Works, a hotspot of eerie activity. On the top floor, where burial shrouds were made, something unseen seems keen on making tea.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen
programme.desc: With Karl on the top floor, Stuart investigates the first floor of this very haunted building and something in the office seems to want to make itself known.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen
programme.desc: The attic space of Hodroyd Hall is one of the properties most haunted areas and Karl & Stuart venture into the darkness to find out what haunts this atmospheric place.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen
programme.desc: Yvette and Karl return to the very haunted Delapre Abbey, where Karl’s attempts to put Yvette in a room on her own, Yvette finds a lift and an unseen force makes itself known.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen
programme.desc: Croxteth Hall stands as one of the Most Haunted places in the UK and tonight Karl enters the deserted upper floors alone to see what lurks in the shadows.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen
programme.desc: The small cottage on the grounds of Eden Camp has a reputation of being incredibly haunted. This time Stuart enters alone to see what awaits him.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen
programme.desc: Karl walks the deserted buildings at the incredibly haunted Eden Camp to investigate the paranormal activity witnessed by countless unsuspecting people.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen
programme.desc: Gregg enters the formidable Dorchester Prison for the first time, filled with apprehension and fear, he soon asks himself if this is a good idea.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen
programme.desc: Part 2 sees Gregg venture ever deeper into the depths of Dorchester Prison and finds himself lost.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: The King of Unicorns seeks Monkey’s magic staff as a gift. Using a magic ring, he captures Tripitaka and weakens Monkey. Pigsy, tempted by Chun-Shou, must resist to save his master.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: The Grey Gloves Devil kills villages with hypnotic eyes. While Pigsy lags, a woman mistakes Tripitaka for her lost son. Captured, Pigsy must escape before the Devil strikes again.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Chen-Gold, the richest man alive, seeks a husband for his daughter while greed consumes him. Obsessed with wealth, he turns himself to gold.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Yung-Hu, a lovesick goblin, falls for a married woman, I-Ling. The pilgrims teach them about love, faith, and the path toward enlightenment.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: As the pilgrims sleep, the Illiterate Vampire tries to bite Tripitaka. When discovered, he’s chased away—learning that even ignorance can be redeemed.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: A kind monster disguises himself as a puppy to win friends, but villagers fear him. The pilgrims teach him that goodness doesn’t need disguise.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: The group meets four sorcerers impersonating them. Monkey and his friends expose the fakes, proving that virtue and truth cannot be copied.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: The pilgrims visit a village where a sacred screen depicts Goddess Sorosvati and the Gods of Fortune. Magic within the painting traps their souls.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: In a land ruled by a wasp witch who kidnaps children, the pilgrims fight to restore families and break the witch’s curse of sorrow.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: On Mt. Sekigutsu, the demon Seisai turns all things to stone. A brave girl defies him, and the pilgrims aid her in freeing the mountain’s beauty.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Shosanpu, a young demon rejected by his parents, practices magic on the pilgrims. His mistakes teach him humility and the meaning of real power.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Lost in the wild, the pilgrims stumble upon Mt. Blue Wolf, home to feral wolf demons. They must survive and uncover the truth behind their arrogance.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: A hungry boy tries to steal food from the pilgrims. Monkey sees himself in the child’s mischief and learns compassion through forgiveness.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Troubled by dreams of his dying mother, Tripitaka questions his duty. The journey teaches him balance between love and spiritual purpose.
programme.sub-title: At the Top of the Mountain

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Monkey steals Heaven’s peaches, gains immortality, and battles officials. All are cast to Earth: Monkey trapped under rocks, Pigsy and Sandy cursed. Buddha decrees a holy man must fetch scriptures from India to save the world.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Kuan-yin seeks a holy man for the scripture quest, choosing young priest Hsüan Tsang, now Tripitaka. With Monkey’s magic staff, his powers, and a talking horse, their journey from China to India begins.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Tripitaka and Monkey start their perilous quest. A village terrorized by Pigsy leads to battle, then they face Sandy the cannibal water monster. Sandstorms and tiger ghosts threaten—will Monkey save his master from doom?

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: The pilgrims meet Golden Horn and Silver Horn. Pigsy is bewitched, Monkey is tested by an old woman, and Tripitaka and Sandy are captured. A Taoist magician turns the tide when Golden Horn loses his magic bottle.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: The youthful King kidnaps Tripitaka, desperate to outshine his father, the King of Ox. Monkey’s powers fail, Pigsy and Sandy are distracted—who will save their master from the fiery-tempered King of Youth?

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Monkey kills disguised demons, but Tripitaka, thinking they were humans, banishes him. When the truth emerges, Tripitaka is endangered, regretting his mistrust of Monkey and disbelief in the demons’ existence.

programme.title: The Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch - Charlotte Crosby
programme.desc: She first burst onto our screens on Geordie Shore—back when her biggest commitment was to Jägerbombs and fake tan. Since then she’s gone from wild nights in Newcastle towinning Celebrity Big Brother.

programme.title: The Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch - Patrice Evra
programme.desc: Today, we’ve got a guest who has lived several lives in one. On the pitch, he was a fierce left-back who collected trophies like kids collect Pokémon cards. Off the pitch, he’s become the man of Monday mornings.

programme.title: The Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch - Ben Whittaker
programme.desc: A guest who has a huge drive and work ethics and has overcome some hurdles that have possibly made him stronger. His entrances make Harry Styles look underdressed at Coachella.

programme.title: The Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch - Kaya Scodelario
programme.desc: She became a household name at just 14years old, when she burst onto our screens in the groundbreaking series Skins. Since then, she’s pursued her acting dreams all the way to Hollywood — and built quite an impressive career.

programme.title: The Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch - Ross Kemp
programme.desc: A courageous man who's living proof you can reinvent yourself more times than a Love Island contestant. He went from pulling pints in the Queen Vic to pulling BAFTAs for documentaries…

programme.title: Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch - Lucy Bronze
programme.desc: Tonight’s guest has lived that journey. From a football-loving kid to one of the world’s finest players, she’s lifted major trophies, captained teams, and become a role model for millions. Lucy Bronze welcome on the Yellow Couch.
programme.sub-title: The Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch - Lucy Bronze

programme.title: The Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch - Ross Kemp
programme.desc: A courageous man who's living proof you can reinvent yourself more times than a Love Island contestant. He went from pulling pints in the Queen Vic to pulling BAFTAs for documentaries…

programme.title: Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch - Lucy Bronze
programme.desc: Tonight’s guest has lived that journey. From a football-loving kid to one of the world’s finest players, she’s lifted major trophies, captained teams, and become a role model for millions. Lucy Bronze welcome on the Yellow Couch.
programme.sub-title: The Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch - Lucy Bronze

programme.title: The Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch - Charlotte Crosby
programme.desc: She first burst onto our screens on Geordie Shore—back when her biggest commitment was to Jägerbombs and fake tan. Since then she’s gone from wild nights in Newcastle towinning Celebrity Big Brother.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Ironside's probe of a friend's (Alan Napier) disappearance in Fiji uncovers extortion and espionage; guest Bernard Fox.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Eve and a friend are kidnap victims with a huge ransom demanded from the friend's banker-husband. Guest star: John Saxon.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Alone and without a telephone or electricity, Ironside must battle a vengeful murderer (Robert Lipton).

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: To protect a convict-rehabilitation program, Ironside must exonerate a reformed burglar charged with jewel theft.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: After his wife is murdered, a convicted thief (William Shatner) is paroled in Ironside's custody to care for his son.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A socialite (Marsha Hunt) pressures the commissioner to solve a series of high-society dog snatchings.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Brown opposes parole for the psychotic murderer (Bill Bixby) who also caused the accidental death of his fiancée.
programme.sub-title: Tom Dayton Is Loose Among Us

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: An anonymous caller planning murder teases Ironside with clues; guests Dane Clark, Virginia Gregg, Barry Brown.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Ironside suspects a government witness's killer belongs to an anti-war organization helping draft evaders; guest Martin Sheen.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A blizzard traps Ironside in a remote cabin with an addict friend (Joseph Campanella) who has run out of drugs.
programme.sub-title: The Happy Dreams of Hollow Men

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A murder attempt on Mark's law professor (James Daly) coincides with the class's re-creation of a murder trial; guest Tyne Daly.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A bitter man (Richard Basehart) seeks revenge on the hippie pals who bilked him; guest Tim Considine.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Police reject a prominent financier's (Carl Betz) murder confession after his jealousy motive proves false.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: In Montreal for a convention, Ironside rekindles a romance while probing a delegate's explosion death.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A veteran officer (Forrest Tucker) uses illegal techniques to trap the drug dealer who ensnared his daughter.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Addicts say Ironside gave drug dealers an inside tip about a narcotics squad probe; guest Gerald S. O'Loughlin.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Mark's defense in a hypothetical law-school assignment triggers the reopening of an old murder case; guest James Wainwright.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Ironside seeks to protect a 14-year-old faith healer from a possibly unscrupulous manager.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A gangster kidnaps a psychologist's (Bradford Dillman) family to force him to uncover an informant's hiding place.

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Emilia looks into the killing of Martin Decker, who had been bludgeoned with a hammer. Police would link the murder to a suspect dubbed the NR3 cat killer.

programme.title: Murdertown: Hull
programme.desc: When a young woman goes missing on Valentine’s Day, detectives turn to a pollen expert, who pieces together fragments of evidence to find her body.

programme.title: Murdertown: Dartford
programme.desc: In 1993, 16-year-old Claire Tiltman is found dying by the roadside. Her killer disappears into the night. More than 20 years later, Colin Ash Smith is finally brought to trial. Jurors hear of how he knew Claire, and even went to her funeral.

programme.title: Murdertown: Dundee
programme.desc: Aged 15, Robbie McIntosh walked into a fish and chip shop to announce that a woman had been killed on the iconic Law Hill. Police revealed the victim had been stabbed dozens of times. But they never imagined that the culprit was the teenager.

programme.title: Murdertown: Barnsley
programme.desc: In 2015, a 69-year-old man is found stabbed in his home. At the scene, forensics uncover a receipt from a nearby cashpoint. CCTV at the bank reveals a woman using the victim's card to withdraw cash. Who is she? And how does she relate to the murder?

programme.title: Murdertown: Pontypridd
programme.desc: In 2014, a woman goes missing after a night drinking in the local pubs. CCTV finds her walking home arm in arm with another drinker. He just happens to be a former butcher. Police soon realise he has put his trade to use by dismembering his victim.

programme.title: Murdertown: Tamworth
programme.desc: In 1994, a gang kill a woman who manages a building society and tie up her husband, before robbing the building society of large sums of cash. But despite making a tearful plea for help, the injured husband’s story doesn’t tally.

programme.title: Murdertown: Watford
programme.desc: In 2000, a young woman is stabbed to death while walking her dog in a picturesque park in the town. A suspect is seen running semi-naked across the M1 motorway. It takes detectives weeks to identify the killer as a local man called Leon Amos.

programme.title: Murdertown: Huddersfield
programme.desc: In 2014 a sex offender called Robert Hind goes missing from a bail hostel. Cops fear he’s absconded to commit crime. The town is scoured. But then the cops learn that the sex offender hasn’t absconded - he’s been murdered.

programme.title: Murdertown: Sunderland
programme.desc: Throughout the early '90s young boys would be found dead after sniffing glue and being trapped in derelict buildings which caught fire. Cops soon found they were actually being systematically murdered by a man called Steven Grieveson.

programme.title: Murdertown: Brighton
programme.desc: In 2015 a man visits a tarot card reader. Within an hour she’s dealt out the death card and he’s confessed to a murder. When cops arrive they discover he’s been living at home with his victim’s body for days.

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Portsmouth: Ten-part true crime series with Katherine Kelly examining the UK's most shocking murders and the impact they've left on local communities. First up: Portsmouth.

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Wrexham: Katherine Kelly explores how Jordan Davidson left an entire community in fear, when his series of increasingly violent crimes culminated in murder.

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Middlesbrough: Katherine Kelly examines Middlesbrough murderer Reginald Wilson, described by criminal psychologists as one of the most dangerous men ever to be assessed.

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Lorraine Thorpe hit headlines as Britain's youngest female double-killer. But more deaths were about to rock the Suffolk town. Katherine Kelly explores.

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Darlington: Katherine Kelly explores cannibal killer David Harker. One of the UK's most disturbed psychopaths, his crime rocked Darlington, causing a second horrific murder.

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Katherine Kelly examines how the murder of 18-year-old Louise Smith rocked the city of Bristol, after she disappeared on Christmas Eve in 1995

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Greenock: Katherine Kelly examines the 1986 murder of 16-year-old Elaine Doyle. One of Scotland's longest-running murder enquiries, it took 26 years to find her killer.

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Nuneaton: Katherine Kelly explores the senseless murder of 15-year-old Naomi Smith and how a series of breakthroughs and DNA evidence led police to her killer.

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Grimsby: Katherine Kelly looks into the 2011 murder of Adam Vincent, a killing so brutal it sparked North Lincolnshire's biggest police investigation in over a century.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Carole and Harry Jarvis were married for over 30 years. But he met a new woman, heiress Rita Heyster, and decided it was time to move on. In a bizarre, twisted scheme, Harry and Rita plotted to murder Carole and cover up her death.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: William Walker was a firefighter and paramedic with a reputation for helping strangers. Little wonder that debt-ridden Uloma Curry was attracted to him. Within weeks of their wedding she was plotting to get her hands on his cash.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Micah Rine's family had a bad feeling about Thomas Pate. He seemed inauthentic. He had a troubled past. But nothing could persuade Micah that he wasn't the man of her dreams. By the time Micah realised Thomas had a dark side, it was too late.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Rod Covlin met Shele Danishevsky at a Jewish singles night. She was older, successful and rich, and Rod was happy to live off his wife. After her mysterious death, it seemed he would stop at nothing to get his hands on her money.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: From the moment she set eyes on co-worker Charlie Stephens, Kirstin was determined to have him; never mind his 40-year marriage. She seduced him, and in doing so set her husband on the path of financial ruin, deception, and ultimately murder.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: When Faye and Marian Caliman first met, she was bowled over by his gentlemanly ways. He was the life and soul of family parties. But when the marriage turned sour, Faye and her family realised Marian was not the true gent he’d always pretended.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Andrew and Janee Parsons’ marriage broke down when she fell for someone new. Still living in the family home, Janee hadn’t reckoned on Andrew’s jealousy and violence - just as he hadn’t realised his horrific actions would all be caught on tape.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Scott Gellatly swept neighbour Lori Jackson off her feet. But her mother Merry had doubts about Scott. He controlled where Lori went, and who she spoke to. So when things turned violent, it wasn’t just Lori in the firing line.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Rhys Hancock was a respected school head; his wife Helen a much-loved PE teacher. When their marriage failed she found love with Martin Griffiths. But Rhys made the choice that ending his wife’s happiness would be worth the long prison sentence.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Heather and Mark Arthur had been married 30 years. But their marriage wasn’t always a happy one: Mark was controlling and jealous, and eventually Heather decided she wanted out. When she confessed to finding new love, Mark’s jealousy boiled over.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Bill Taylor loved wife Angela, even when she left him, even when she met new partner, Paul Cannon. But Angela hated Bill, because he refused to divorce her. The answer, in Angela and Paul’s minds, was to end the marriage by any means necessary.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Greg Williams was Michelle’s knight in shining armour. A mother of three, working in the sex industry, Greg was her ticket to a luxurious life. When an intruder breached their mansion’s security and attacked the couple, detectives were baffled.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Maria Sanutti-Spencer revelled in her dad Rocco’s criminal past, and threatened violent retribution for anyone who crossed her. As her marriage broke down, her husband, Frank, saw first-hand what Maria and her father were capable of.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Claire and Andrew Tavener were a sociable couple. But when Andrew drank, he became paranoid and possessive. So when he threatened to kill his 'cheating' wife, his friends wrote it off as the rambling of a drunk.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Dallas Augustine had a rocky start in life, including a famous mother cut down in her prime by a murderous husband. Then, when she met Jessie McCaskill, it seemed her life had fallen into place. But their marriage soon descended into violence.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Jessica was swept off her feet by businessman Sonny. He totally adored her and her daughter, but adoration soon turned to jealousy and controlling behaviour. When she finally tried to leave him, it ended in two brutal murders.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Tom and Kelley Clayton were an alpha couple: attractive, athletic, popular. Drawn to the professional hockey player’s bad boy reputation, she would later discover just how bad her cheating, scheming husband really was.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Debbie Griggs had three young kids, and was pregnant with her fourth. But she believed husband Andrew was sleeping with a teenage girl, and had threatened divorce. That’s when she went missing, and it would take cops 20 years to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Glenna and Marty Duram’s marriage was always volatile. They argued about money and Glenna’s gambling habit. Jokes about killing one another barely raised an eyebrow - until the day Marty was actually found dead.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: When Adrian and Jane Goldsmith met they were both hoping for a second chance of happiness; someone to grow old with. But police officer Adrian was a troubled man, plagued by paranoia and dark imaginings.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Nowhere to Run
programme.desc: After three years of emotional abuse, Peggy breaks it off with her boyfriend. But when he begins watching Peggy's every move, she has to take matters into her own hands.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: The Puppet Master
programme.desc: Christy Martin is the toughest female boxer in the world. But outside the ring, Christy deals with the fight of her life as she's blackmailed and abused by her husband...who is also her coach.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Power Play
programme.desc: Jane Haag rarely has time to date until she falls in love with Ron. But Jane discovers that Ron is a virtual time bomb about to explode.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Teenage Obsession
programme.desc: When outgoing Cameron Wallace meets shy Ryan Clutter in a high school art class, they are only acquaintances. Little does she know that Ryan will stalk her for the next ten years.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Stealth Stalker
programme.desc: When Terri Mendez breaks up with Jose, she doesn't know he's watching every move she makes. When Terri discovers hidden cameras in her bedroom, she realizes there's nowhere to hide.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Off the Deep End
programme.desc: Sheila Taormina, an Olympic gold medalist, finds herself receiving strange phone calls and letters from a fellow athlete. Before long, he is following her around the country.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Gamble with Death
programme.desc: After Donna Eskew calls off her romance with Glen, he corners Donna in a casino parking lot with a chilling threat. She'll have to use all her wits to stay alive.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Badlands
programme.desc: Marie DePalma, a shy middle school student in Detroit, is thrilled when an older student takes an interest in her. As their relationship develops, her life turns into a living hell.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Cat and Mouse
programme.desc: Deborah finds herself in a fairytale romance with bad boy Steven. But after they marry, Deborah becomes a subject to daily abuse. When she leaves him, Steven stops at nothing to get revenge.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Sex & Malice
programme.desc: After Ann Moulds is bombarded with sadistic letters from an anonymous stalker, she tries to get help from police. But with no stalking laws in Scotland, she's at her stalker's mercy.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Collateral Damage
programme.desc: Rachel Wilson's marriage falls apart when husband Darrell starts hiring hookers. But when Rachel moves on and finds the perfect man, Darrell erupts in rage.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Stalked.com
programme.desc: After meeting online, Patrick begins to stalk Kristen across the web. Kristen begins to realize that nothing will stop her cyberstalker from tracking her down with deadly intentions.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Idol Worship
programme.desc: Jessica Sierra is excited to be an American Idol contestant. But when an obsessed fan starts calling non-stop, the thrill of fame turns to sheer terror when she receives disturbing threats.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Good Vs Evil
programme.desc: When Jennifer Paulson rejects the advances of college classmate Jed, she unwittingly sets off a dangerous chain of events.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Nightmare Next Door
programme.desc: 13-year-old Jessie Cooper thinks Nick Hamilton is just a nice neighbor. Little does she know he's a sex offender with a penchant for adolescent girls.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Deadly Envy
programme.desc: An aspiring Hollywood actress is reacquainted with an old friend and fellow actress who becomes deeply jealous of her beauty and success.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Model Killer
programme.desc: A gorgeous young model is bludgeoned to death in her downtown apartment. The wounds to her head are so severe police initially presume she's been shot.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Burning Obsession
programme.desc: In 1988, a promiscuous 22-year old boy from the Sikh community has one affair too many and ends up losing his life. Diligent detective work and DNA help police nail the killer who believed he had gotten away with murder.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Jeweler's Wife
programme.desc: The wife of a successful jeweler is found dead in their home. The jeweler immediately falls under suspicion, but he's not alone.

programme.title: 72 Hours: The Great Despisers
programme.desc: A 19 year old man comes home one night to discover that his family had all been savagely murdered. Could it be the insurance money and a movie called "The Great Despisers" that motivated the killers to perpetrate such violence?

programme.title: 72 Hours: Cold Hit
programme.desc: In 1994, a troubled single mother is found raped and murdered in her apartment. Was it one of the volatile men in her life? All possible suspects are eliminated and the case goes cold for three years, until a nine-year old girl is brutally raped.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Evil Eyes
programme.desc: A dead woman is found in a park. It’s learned the deceased is a divorced landlady of a group home for transients. The suspect list is long; the clues to follow are few.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Angel of Death
programme.desc: An angel of mercy turns out to be an angel of death when the number of deaths in an Indiana Intensive Care Unit skyrockets. One astute nurse believes there must be more to this than just natural causes.

programme.title: 72 Hours: The Game
programme.desc: 1995 - Houston, Texas. A lonely man calls a dating service and gets more than he bargained for when he is met at gunpoint and robbed by his “dates”. The women, dubbed “Thelma & Louise”, lure men with the promise of sex but then drug and rob them.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Murder on Campus
programme.desc: The bizarre murder of a world-renowned anthropologist over the Christmas holidays shocks staff and students at the university where she teaches.

programme.title: 72 Hours: The Violinist
programme.desc: Surgically clean body parts start turning up on a highway. Stranger still, they have been drained of every drop of blood.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Kidnapped
programme.desc: A wealthy Asian girl is kidnapped in Vancouver. When the kidnappers make the fateful error of using the young girl’s cell phone, police are able to track their movements and capture the assailants.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Sweet Killer
programme.desc: An aging hippy is going through bad times. When he's found dead in his home with a gut of antifreeze, it's a closed case. Then a shocking confession reveals a maelstrom of lies and a story of cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Bull's Eye
programme.desc: A Girl Guide leader is found dead on the floor of her bedroom. When an autopsy reveals a bullet lodged in her brain, detectives learn they’re investigating a murder.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Thrill Kill
programme.desc: When a senior citizen is killed on a city street, authorities at first treat it as a typical hit-and-run accident. But as they investigate further, they begin to realize that the culprit is a thrill-seeking psychopath.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Mad Bomber
programme.desc: In 1996 a serial bomber begins planting bombs in public places and terrorizes the Prince Edward Island community. The mystery person leaves a strange swastika as a calling card, eluding capture for eight years.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Danger in the Woods
programme.desc: Three teenagers accompany a deliveryman to a densely wooded area for a drinking party that, before long, becomes a nightmare. Things take a terrifying turn when one of teens attacks the others.

programme.title: 72 Hours: The Hustler
programme.desc: Three people meet - the son of a wealthy Frenchman, a Vancouver businessman looking for investors. Unbeknownst to two of them, they are the latest victims of a notorious international con man.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Lust
programme.desc: One morning in the stairwell of a Toronto building, a guard makes a grotesque discovery: the dead body of a Filipina nanny. It's clear she's been savagely murdered and raped.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Predator
programme.desc: The phone rings in the middle of the night. On the other end of the line, the sounds of an attack. The couple that receive the call rush to its source and discover a horrific scene.

programme.title: Someone They Knew
programme.desc: After a work party went late, Ramona Krotine decided it was time to call it a night. But she never made it home-or did she?

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: One person's junk is another person's treasure! But who, in their right mind, would throw away a perfectly good genie bottle? // During show-and-tell, Angela shows off the latest addition to her toy drawer: a line of rather creepy-looking designer dolls.
programme.sub-title: Garage sale genie // Ghouls and dolls

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: When Mona's parents accidentally sell her Book of the Slimy at their garage sale Mona has to get it back // Can a lovelorn vampire lady and a lonely-hearted werewolf find true love?

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: After a ventriloquist act gets big laughs at Mona's expense, she discovers that the dummy is alive // Mona notices a mysterious limousine cruising around town causing adults to lose their confidence about going to their high school reunion.

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: Mona and her pals meet their monster movie hero and discover that he REALLY lives the part. // Mrs. Bryerson's wedding to the local lawn bowling champ is in jeopardy
programme.sub-title: The Transformation of Frank Stein // Taking the Cake

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: Mona's cousin, Dottie, prepares for her big dance recital with a certain amount of trepidation. // Angela has a new pet a talking parrot who seems a little TOO clever to be a simple bird.
programme.sub-title: Hex of a dancer // The two magicians

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: When Fang and the other cats in town start behaving strangely and then start disappearing, Mona's investigations lead to the factory // Mona and her friends discover who is behind the recent shark sightings at the local beach
programme.sub-title: The Sharkman Goeth // Dr. Purrman’s Secret Recipe

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: Charley's opportunity to make a little babysitting money turns into a close encounter with a family of aliens and their identical triplet sons // Zapman decides to strike out on his own after Mona embarrasses him in the schoolyard.

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: A sinister Cyborg Phantasm wreaks havoc with the world of electrical appliances. // When Mona's cat, Fang, goes missing after a scolding, Mona tracks him to a wondrous underwater world where he is held captive by an underwater emperor.
programme.sub-title: Cyborg Phantasm // Kitten of the Sea

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: Old Mr. Williams who lives across the street from Mona has always kept to himself. // When she is reprimanded for breaking her mother's favorite vase, a miffed Mona seeks refuge in the basement a ten year old vampire's last sanctuary.

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: Hair-raising night-time howling. The mysterious disappearance of Mrs. Bryerson's poodle. // It's the annual science fair and Mona has pulled out all the stops.
programme.sub-title: The miserable phantom dog // Jurassic parking lot

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: Mona and friends try to get all the mothers in town to realize that Ms. Marvellous' tips are a recipe for disaster. // The annual spelling bee promises to be a stinging success when the local honey producer becomes its main sponsor.
programme.sub-title: Mona Vs. Ms. Marvelous // Spelling Bee

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: Albert Einstein? Julius Caesar? Walking around downtown? // After a mysterious clockmaker does some work on the new town clock, strange things start to happen.

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: When Miss Gotto moves into a new house, she enlists the help of Mona and co. to clean the place up. // At night, you can hear it a distant, mournful wail coming from the swamp.
programme.sub-title: Miss Gotto's Haunted House // Cry of the Swamp Thing

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: Fang develops a flea problem, which soon infests the whole house. // Ever since Principal Shawbly started jogging, he's felt a lot lighter.
programme.sub-title: Flea circus of horrors // Shadow of a doubt

programme.title: Mona the Vampire

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Organized Crime
programme.desc: When Cagney and Lacey investigate the brutal murder of a nun, they discover that the nun was the goddaughter of a local mobster. The mobster offers to conduct the investigation within his organization. Meanwhile, Cagney gets promoted to Sergeant.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: On The Street
programme.desc: Cagney and Lacey investigate the beating of a teenage runaway who has shunned her family's wealth and instead has been living and working on the streets as a hooker. The detectives must try and convince her to help convict her pimp.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Ordinary Hero
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) find themselves in a jam when the witness in an assault case turns out to be an illegal alien who is about to be deported. Also starring Al Waxman as Lt. Bert Samuels and Carl Lumbly as Mark Petrie.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: The Psychic
programme.desc: A psychic's (guest star Elizabeth Ashley) predictions provide Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) with their only leads when a missing person's case turns into a murder investigation. Also starring Al Waxman and Carl Lumbly.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: The Lottery
programme.desc: Cagney and Lacey are brought in when a lottery jackpot is being claimed by multiple people. They must decide who has the real ticket and whose winning ticket is actually counterfeit. Meanwhile, Lacey and Harvey prepare for an IRS audit.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Entrapment
programme.desc: During an underground investigation of a notorious narcotics dealer, Cagney crosses the line to entrapment and expects Lacey to commit perjury on her behalf. Lacey must then decide if she stands by her partner or admit to knowing nothing about it.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: The Clinic
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey's (Tyne Daly) investigation of the fire-bombing of an abortion clinic places them on opposing sides over this controversial issue. When a patient is killed in the blast, they must decide if it was one murder or two.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Mothers And Sons
programme.desc: The detective must crack a mother's testimony on the alibi of her son who is accused of robbery and assault while Lacey (Tyne Daly) must deal with her own son's problems at school. Also starring Sharon Gless as Christine Cagney.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Filial Duty
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) investigate the robbery and murder of a 70-year-old recluse as Charlie Cagney (guest star Dick O'Neill) is hospitalized with pneumonia. Meanwhile, a pregnant Lacey must learn to adapt her work routine.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Old Ghosts
programme.desc: Cagney is branded as a coward after a robbery suspect is able to elude her during a chase. She is suspended from duty, leaving Lacey to clear her name. Meanwhile, Cagney's brother Brian visits from California and checks in on their father.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Power
programme.desc: When Cagney is placed in charge of the 14th Precinct during Lt. Samuels' vacation, her fellow detectives accuse her of being on a power trip. Meanwhile she is disappointed that one of her first assignments is to force Lacey to go on maternity leave.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Play It Again, Santa
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) goes undercover with Det. Jonah Newman (guest star Dan Shor) to investigate a series of disappearing Santa Clauses and issues with music rights. Also starring Tyne Daly as Mary Beth Lacey and Al Waxman as Lt. Bert Samuels.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: The Rapist
programme.desc: When Lacey goes out on maternity leave, Cagney's is given a temporary partner temporary partner, Sara Jones. Jones becomes obsessed with a rape investigation and increasingly frustrated with the length of time it is taking to arrest the suspect.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Act Of Conscience
programme.desc: While Lacey is on maternity leave, Cagney is assigned a controversial new partner who's past of turning in other cops who have participated in illegal activity makes the rest of the 14th precinct question how long he will stay among them.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: D.W.I.
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) goes undercover with Det. Jonah Newman (guest star Dan Shor) to investigate a series of disappearing Santa Clauses and issues with music rights. Also starring Tyne Daly as Mary Beth Lacey and Al Waxman as Lt. Bert Samuels.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: The Gimp
programme.desc: While investigating a series of muggings of disabled persons, Cagney (Sharon Gless) gets a first-hand look at the problems they face and becomes romantically involved with a man (guest star James Stacy) who is handicapped and advocating for change.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Family Connections
programme.desc: Cagney has to rush to Lacey's side at the hospital, hoping that she can make it before the baby is delivered. Being around Lacey and her family makes Cagney have second thoughts about her life as a singleton. Cagney's father has a new girlfriend.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Post Partum
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) becomes involved in a case where a West Point cadet is charged with possession of cocaine and is refusing to help himself due to his honor code. Meanwhile, Lacey's (Tyne Daly) father pays her a visit after a 30-year absence.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Toad Warriors
programme.desc: In the badlands of Car Land, Mario, Luigi, Princess Toadstool and Toad are riding in a brown convertible car, planning on rendezvousing with several Mushroom rebels.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: The Pied Koopa
programme.desc: In Pasta Land, King Koopa uses a magical flute to lure all of the local Mushroom children away from the town, and leads them to his nearby castle.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: The Bird! The Bird!
programme.desc: While venturing in a snowy world, Toad is kidnapped by a nearsighted Birdo who is convinced that he is her missing baby.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Mario of the Deep
programme.desc: Mario, Luigi, Princess Toadstool and Toad have travelled to the underwater kingdom of Aqua Land in a submarine built from a bathtub in order to fight against BarraKoopa.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Mario and the Beanstalk
programme.desc: Desperate for cash, the Marios trade the royal cow for bean seeds. Princess scolds them, and accidentally sneezes, blowing the beans into the yard.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Mush Rumors/The Ugly Mermaid
programme.desc: A Family of Real World Humans stray off the vacation path and find themselves lost./In an underwater battle with King Koopa and his Doom Sub, the Brothers find Mev-tropolis.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: The Great BMX Race
programme.desc: To help Toad pay off his debt to Fry Guy, Mario and Luigi enter a bike race in hopes to collect the prize money. But what they don't know is that it's all a trap planned by Koopa.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Crimes R Us/Life's Ruff
programme.desc: King Koopa and his evil horde orchestrate the escape of an infamous criminal./The mischievous Koopa Kids Hip and Hop snatch King Windbag's magic wand and zap him and Luigi.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Mario and Joliet
programme.desc: In the Land of Romance, Mario, Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool, who had been called to the Land of Romance by a friend of Princess Toadstool, are currently trapped in a rapidly crumbling building.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Pirates of Koopa
programme.desc: In Pirate Waters, located in Pirate World, Mario and Luigi are in the middle of peeling potatoes onboard a ship.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: The Venice Menace/Super Koopa
programme.desc: When a gondola suddenly warps into the Mushroom Kingdom, Mario and Luigi discover Venice./Kooky Von Koopa makes a magic pendant that gives King Koopa the power to become Super Koopa!

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Stars in their Eyes
programme.desc: In the depths of space, Mario, Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool are all aboard a yellow spaceship, which is currently traveling through a swarm of flaming meteors.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Love 'em and Leave 'em
programme.desc: Mario and Co arrive in Rotunda Land, which is ruled by the uptight Queen Rotunda. After being caught, Mario unintentionally gets Rotunda to drink a love potion, causing her to fall in love with him, much to his dismay.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Reign Storm/Toddler Terrors Of Time Travel
programme.desc: The Princess goes on her very first vacation to the real world Hawaii. King Koopa and Kooky Von Koopa travel back in time to defeat the Mario Brothers.
programme.sub-title: Reign Storm/Toddler Terrors Of Time Travel

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Jungle Fever
programme.desc: In the Amazon Jungle, Mario, using a plunger to swat his way through a variety of flora, leads Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool in their search for Dr. Sheldon, a mysterious witch doctor.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: The Adventures of Sherlock Mario
programme.desc: In Victoria, Mario and Luigi are riding atop a carriage being pulled by a horse traveling down a street in search of a great detective by the name of Herlock Solmes, with Toad and Princess Toadstool riding in the carriage.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: King Mario of Cramalot
programme.desc: Mario and Co arrive in Cramalot, only to be assualted by Beezos. They are saved by Mervin the magician, who tells them about how Koopa took over Cramalot.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: True Colors/Recycled Koopa
programme.desc: King Koopa drops paint on the Mushroom people, turning some red and others blue./The Koopa kids clean up the castle and dump all their junk into a warp pipe.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Mind Your Mummy Mommy, Mario/The Beauty Of Kootie
programme.desc: Hip and Hop steal the golden mummy case of Prince Mushroom-khamen, a dead ringer for Mario. King Koopa is siphoning off all the oil from Desertland to power his doomship!
programme.sub-title: Mind Your Mummy Mommy, Mario/The Beauty Of Kootie

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Mario's Magic Carpet
programme.desc: Mario and Co are traveling through a desert, dying of thirst. Thanks to a boobytrap, they wind up in the palace of Sultan Pasbah, who tries to force Princess into his harem, while the guys are sent to the dungeon.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Hooded Robin and his Mario Men
programme.desc: While searching for a place known as Sharewood Village, Mario, Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool find themselves lost in Sharewood Forest; as Mario, Luigi and Princess Toadstool stand nearby, Toad begins to glance at his map to Sharewood Village
programme.sub-title: Hooded Robin and his Mario Men

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Brooklyn Bound
programme.desc: In the Snow World, Mario, Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool, exhausted and hungry, weakly venture forth through a snowy field, mentioning that the hoards of Koopa Khan are after them.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Count Koopula
programme.desc: In a dark forest, Mario, Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool are running frantically through pouring rain, in a mysterious place called Turtlevania.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Butch Mario & The Luigi Kid
programme.desc: While trying to rescue the Princess from an abandoned mine, the Mario brothers find themselves running from Sheriff Mouser and his minions who are after the large reward Koopa has promised for their capture.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Toadally Magical Adventure/Misadventures In Babysitting
programme.desc: Toad is toadally infatuated with the Wizard King's new magic wand. / The Mario Brothers are warped into a Brooklyn apartment and are appointed as babysitters.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Rolling Down The River
programme.desc: The Marios and Toad are trying to save Princess from Koopa's riverboat. When their plan goes horribly wrong, Toad gets caught and the Marios barely escape with their lives.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Sneaking Lying Cheating Giant Ninja Koopas/Reptiles In The Rose Garden
programme.desc: King Koopa uses a Magic Wand to turn Cheatsy, Bigmouth, Bully, and Kooky into giants./Kootie Pie demands that she be given Real World America as a gift.
programme.sub-title: Sneaking Lying Cheating Giant Ninja Koopas/Reptiles In The Rose Garden

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Dadzilla/Tag Team Trouble
programme.desc: Kootie Pie and Big Mouth are convinced they are much too beautiful to be adopted!/Toad thinks he has lost the million gold coins the Princess had him deliver.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Up, Up And A Koopa/7 Continents For 7 Koopas
programme.desc: The 'KoopaDoopaRaiserUpper' device sends the Mushroom Kingdom up into the clouds./Koopa and his Koopalings invade the real world in the Doom Ship, sealing all the warp pipes.
programme.sub-title: Up, Up And A Koopa/7 Continents For 7 Koopas

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Two Plumbers and a Baby
programme.desc: The Princess falls into the Fountain of Youth, transforming her into a baby. Now, the Mario Bros. have to protect her while looking for a way to reverse it.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Oh Brother/Mighty Plumber
programme.desc: A grudging hostility is aroused between the Brothers when they are Kooped up in Toad's cottage./Using a magic wand, King Koopa sucks the TV hero Mighty Plumber from the television.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Bad Rap
programme.desc: Mario, Luigi, Princess Toadstool and Toad have arrived in Rap Land, because King Koopa had kidnapped Rap Land's king, and is attempting to take everyone's money by playing an eerie theme throughout the land.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Robo Koopa
programme.desc: Mario, Luigi, Princess Toadstool and Toad have ventured to Robo Land in pursuit of King Koopa, whom they had intended to stop.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: The Fire of Hercufleas
programme.desc: In the ancient city of Mythis, Mario, Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool are searching for a legendary hero named Hercufleas, who is an old friend of Toad's.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Do The Koopa/Kootie Pie Rocks
programme.desc: Mario and his friends set out for Darkland and the Temple of Gloom./Mario, Luigi and the Princess go to the real world to see Milli Vanilli in concert.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Princess Toadstool For President/Never Koop A Koopa
programme.desc: Princess Toadstool is fed up with Koopa and challenges him to try and win an election./Koopa announces that he is giving up being bad for good!
programme.sub-title: Princess Toadstool For President/Never Koop A Koopa

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Mario Meets Koop-Zilla
programme.desc: In the oriental city of Sayonara, Mario, Toad, Princess Toadstool and Luigi, who is pulling the cart Mario, Toad and Princess Toadstool are riding, are searching for a weapon that can help them defeat King Koopa, Super Sushi.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Bonkers from Yonkers
programme.desc: Mario and Co head to the Linguini Empire to attend a benefit spaghetti dinner. When they arrive, Princess and Toad are separated from the Marios and meet Koopa, who's taken over.

programme.title: Tsunami: Facing the Global Threat
programme.desc: Tsunamis are so sudden and powerful that in a matter of minutes, they can wipe out a coastline.

programme.title: Boeing 737 Max: What Went Wrong?
programme.desc: How did the fastest-selling aircraft in Boeing's history, the Boeing 737 MAX, end its run in two tragedies?

programme.title: Killer Asteroid
programme.desc: Can a new generation of cutting-edge space missions face the ultimate natural disaster?

programme.title: Eruption: The Countdown Begins
programme.desc: In this gripping drama, a scientist is convinced that a volcanic eruption is near. He attempts to tell others.

programme.title: Lake Geneva: The Giant Tsunami
programme.desc: In 563 AD, Geneva was destroyed by a tsunami, and it could happen again. Scientists are working to assess the danger and prepare for disaster.

programme.title: The Great Wall of Japan
programme.desc: Is Japan's 15-meter high, 500-kilometer long anti-tsunami wall worth the environmental and human impact?

programme.title: Fatal Forecast
programme.desc: Floods can be one of the deadliest forces of nature. Scientists are working tirelessly to help stem the tide.

programme.title: Fatal Forecast
programme.desc: The impact of drought on agriculture can have dire consequences. Its impacts and victims can go unrecognized.

programme.title: Fatal Forecast
programme.desc: Scientists are working to mitigate the damage hurricanes cause. But their risk will get even worse.

programme.title: Firefighters: In the Heart of Danger
programme.desc: After a dry spring, the woods around Marseille are ready to go up in flames. Firefighters plan for the worst.

programme.title: Firefighters: In the Heart of Danger
programme.desc: Fire engines are placed at strategic points, and teams of firefighters in Provence are ready for action.

programme.title: Firefighters: In the Heart of Danger
programme.desc: A pyromaniac is on the loose, with major blazes in the Bouches du Rhone. This fire season will be bad.

programme.title: Halifax Explosion: Catastrophe to Independence
programme.desc: The Halifax Explosion was a devastating event that changed the lives of blind Canadians for the better.

programme.title: China Quake

programme.title: Johnny Strange: Born to Fly
